title: Dominus
description: Forge 1.20.1 | The Hardcore Fantasy RPG modpack you need!
body:
![Dominus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pYP75es2/images/33ac6118c8c53890457807a4e274d9992b9e8a44.png)

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73f03911c575aeffa2486badabd45f43f0dcadf3.png)

ÔťĘImproved Combat!

ÔťĘA World Ripe for Exploration! ([Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored), [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark/versions))

ÔťĘOptimizations & Shader Support!

ÔťĘOverhauled Structures! ([Yung's Better Structures](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG), [Dungeons & Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns))

ÔťĘCataclysmic Bosses! ([Cracker's Wither Storm Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod), [L_Ender's Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm))

ÔťĘStylised Mini-Map! ([Antique Atlas 4](https://modrinth.com/mod/antique-atlas-4))

ÔťĘConsistent Gameplay!

ÔťĘ200+ Mods!

ÔťĘOrigins!


![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e143ef8cb3809016b274b20938ffedce73c9437d.png)

Dominus is a combat orientited modpack with new bosses, biomes, mobs, and structures.
